rule.statement: tsconfig has `strict: true`; explicit subset of strict flags is forbidden (no à-la-carte).
rule.rationale: strict bundles compound; opting out one flag misses bugs the other flags catch.

rule.statement: ESLint uses eslint.config.js flat config (ESLint 9+); .eslintrc is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Legacy eslintrc is in EOL countdown; flat config is the supported future.

rule.statement: Default exports are forbidden except in framework-required files (Next.js pages, etc).
rule.rationale: Named exports keep refactors safe (rename propagates); default exports rename silently.

rule.statement: Monorepos use pnpm + workspaces; npm + lerna combo is forbidden.
rule.rationale: pnpm's content-addressable store + workspaces are the simplest correct monorepo setup.

rule.statement: Files name their runtime in the path or filename (`*.node.ts` / `*.bun.ts` / `*.browser.ts`); cross-runtime imports require a wrapper.

rationale.source: Internal — observed in faion-net-fe build failures Q1 2026

rule.rationale: Without the marker, Node-only APIs leak into browser bundles and crash at runtime.
